keyspace_name.description: The name of the keyspace that the table is going to be created in.

default_time_to_live.description: The default Time to Live setting in seconds for the table.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.

capacity_specification.description: Specifies the read/write throughput capacity mode for the table.
capacity_specification.type: list(object({read_capacity_units : number, throughput_mode : string, write_capacity_units : number}))

client_side_timestamps.description: Enables client-side timestamps for the table.

encryption_specification.description: Specifies how the encryption key for encryption at rest is managed for the table.

point_in_time_recovery.description: Specifies if point-in-time recovery is enabled or disabled for the table.

schema_definition.description: Describes the schema of the table.
schema_definition.type: list(object({column : object({name : string, type : string}), partition_key : object({name : string}), clustering_key : object({name : string, order_by : string}), static_column : object({name : string})}))

ttl.description: Enables Time to Live custom settings for the table.
